div.style: display: flex; align-items: unsafe center; justify-content: unsafe center; width: 558px; height: 1px; padding-top: 20px; margin-left: 1px;
box-sizing: border-box; font-size: 0; text-align: center; color: #000000;

div.div:
Initialiser les variables
- Score = 0
- Vies = 3
- manche = 1
- isPaused = false
